title: YOU ARE MISSING THIS DEAL: Transform Conventional DTI Failures into Non-QM Successes
subtitle: Unlock the power of asset depletion strategies to rescue deals and elevate your pipeline.
keyTakeaways: Identify clients with significant assets but limited income documentation.
Utilize asset depletion to convert declined conventional loans.
Gather necessary documentation: asset statements, CPA letters.
Price scenarios and upload documents in PRO Portal for streamlined processing.
Educate clients and partners on the benefits of asset-based lending.

sections.heading: Recognize Opportunity Beyond Conventional
sections.body: Conventional loan denials due to DTI issues can often be turned around with a strategic pivot to Non-QM asset depletion. Many brokers overlook asset-rich clients like retirees, missing out on potential deals.
bullets: Analyze your pipeline for asset-heavy clients.
Avoid defaulting to FHA when asset depletion is possible.

sections.heading: Actionable Steps to Rescue Deals
sections.body: Rescuing a deal starts with recognizing the financial strength of clients beyond their income statements. Here's how to effectively leverage asset depletion.
bullets: Collect three years of asset statements for qualifying income.
Obtain a CPA letter confirming asset liquidation potential.
Price the scenario and upload documents using PRO Portal.

sections.heading: Educate and Elevate Your Strategy
sections.body: Position yourself as a financial strategist by educating clients and realtors on asset-based lending. Demonstrating expertise in Non-QM options sets you apart and enhances your professional value.
bullets: Host informational sessions on asset-based lending.
Highlight successful case studies to build trust.

metaDescription: Turn DTI denials into approvals with UFF's Non-QM asset depletion solutions. Boost your closings today.
